description: Coulson’s team uncovers a secret entrance and prepares for a confrontation. They encounter a Centipede soldier, a demonstration of the threat Hydra now poses with mass-produced super soldiers. The scene is charged as the stakes of the final battle become clear.

transcript.line: Come on. Over here. There's something behind this wall. Okay, I got something.
Secret door? I got this. They're like my thing. Here we go.
